signals.headline: Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in Eastern First Round | NO (Raptors Series Win) | HIGH confidence** [4][5]
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in Eastern First Round | NO (Raptors Series Win) | HIGH confidence** [4][5]

Cleveland won Game 2 115-105 (Donovan Mitchell 30 pts, James Harden 28 pts), putting Toronto down 0-2 despite regular-season sweep; Raptors' Brandon Ingram struggled (7 pts on 3-15 FG), Ja'Kobe Walter questionable (illness) for Game 3, Immanuel Quickley out (hamstring) [4][5]. No conference semi
